title: Cybersecurity Guidebook to Help Bahrain’s MSMEs Build Resilience
summary: Provides MSMEs with scalable guidance aligned with national cybersecurity goals, including risk assessment, security infrastructure, awareness, threat-intelligence collaboration, maturity models, case studies, access controls, backups, cloud security and incident readiness.

theme_notes.cybersecurity.security_controls_framewor: Practical cybersecurity guidebook for Bahrain micro, small and medium enterprises.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Bahrain National Cyber Security Strategy 2025-2028
